programmes.show_description: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma. Gerald returns to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his finger. Vinnie has an embarrassing birthmark on his neck. S2, Ep8
My Brainlike Bump. Debra has a large, brainlike growth on the side of her head that feels like a sponge, has crevices and emits an odour. Cowboy Dusten has painful lump on his knee. S4, Ep10
Brandon's Story. Brandon is a talented musician and singer but his addiction to food has left him incapacitated, and he risks losing his girlfriend and his career dreams. S7, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Pursuit Of Perfection Show. Amy has seen the dress of her dreams - but can she boost her budget? Aisling returns for a fitting, but worries that gorgeous details have been lost. S3, Ep31

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Wed To The Dress Show. Bride Grace has fallen for a gown that exceeds her budget and is only available in America. Can David find her another, cheaper dream dress? S3, Ep32
Here Comes The Bride Again...And Again. Keasha bonds with cancer survivor, Jennifer while they search for a dress. Plus, a bad-tempered bride takes her frustrations out on Vera. S2, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
The Wild And Woolly World. Missy's first heartbreak triggers a series of events that lead the Cooper family to the brink. S4, Ep18
One Bad Night. Sheldon and Missy both run away from home, while Mary gets some upsetting news about her husband, George. S5, Ep1
Snoopin' Around. Sheldon encourages Missy to question the Bible. Meemaw determines to catch George Sr. in a lie, and Mary helps Pastor Jeff search for a youth pastor. S5, Ep2
Potential Energy And Hooch. While Sheldon tries to convince Dr. Sturgis to return to the university, Georgie upsets the family when he makes a life-changing decision. S5, Ep3
Pish Posh And A Secret Room. While Meemaw opens a secret gambling room, Sheldon, Missy and Georgie adapt to new living arrangements. S5, Ep4
Stuffed Animals. While Mary's away, George finds himself giving advice on Missy's love life. And Georgie has a solution for Meemaw's business woes. S5, Ep5
The Proposal Proposal. What did she say? Amy answers Sheldon's marriage proposal. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle with some unexpected news. S11, Ep1
The Retraction Reaction. Leonard's job is at stake when he gives an embarrassing radio interview which angers the university and the entire physics community. S11, Ep2
The Relaxation Integration. Amy tries to convince Sheldon that he has a more laid-back side, meanwhile, Raj and Stuart compete to win the heart of Bernadette's new co-worker. S11, Ep3
The Explosion Implosion. Wolowitz and Sheldon bond over their relationships with their disappointing fathers. And Leonard's mum finds a new best friend in Penny. S11, Ep4
Collaboration Contamination. Sheldon and Raj confide in Bernadette when they can't handle Amy and Howard working together. Penny and Leonard learn new ways to deal with Sheldon. S11, Ep5
The Proton Regeneration. Sheldon goes head-to-head with Wil Wheaton. Penny takes care of Halley when Bernadette and Howard are both on bed rest. S11, Ep6
The Geology Methodology. Sheldon and Bert collaborate on a research project, while Penny and Bernadette coach Koothrappali on how to navigate his relationship with Ruchi. S11, Ep7
The Tesla Recoil. Leonard and Howard learn Sheldon went to work with the military. Bernadette suspects Ruchi is trying to steal her job. S11, Ep8
The Bitcoin Entanglement. The guys cut Sheldon out of a potentially valuable Bitcoin investment. Also, an old video reveals a secret about Leonard and Penny's relationship. S11, Ep9
The Confidence Erosion. Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from wedding planning using maths. Raj realises his best friend is actually hurting his confidence. S11, Ep10
The Celebration Reverberation. Sheldon and Howard plan birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. Leonard spirals out about his lack of accomplishments. S11, Ep11
The Matrimonial Metric. Sheldon and Amy subject their friends to a series of experiments to choose the best man and maid of honour. And Penny reveals her true feelings. S11, Ep12
The Solo Oscillation. Amy and Leonard bond during a series of experiments. Bert replaces Howard in Footprints on the Moon, and Sheldon finds Penny a source of inspiration. S11, Ep13
The Separation Triangulation. Raj learns the woman he's dating has a very upset husband. Sheldon rents his old room for a quiet place to work. S11, Ep14
The Novelization Correlation. Wil Wheaton offers Amy a role on the new 'Professor Proton Show,' and Penny thinks the female protagonist in Leonard's novel is based on her. S11, Ep15
The Neonatal Nomenclature. All Bernadette's friends try different tactics to get labour started. Amy accidentally reveals she's already chosen their son's name. S11, Ep16
The Athenaeum Allocation. Leonard tries to secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy. Bernadette and Howard have a hard time deciding who should go back to work. S11, Ep17
The Gates Excitation. Bill Gates' company wants to partner with Penny's pharmaceutical company. Leonard, Raj and Howard do everything in their power to meet him. S11, Ep18
The Tenant Disassociation. Leonard decides to run against Sheldon for president of the tenants' association. Bernadette encourages Howard and Raj to find the owner of a drone. S11, Ep19
The Reclusive Potential. A reclusive scientist invites Sheldon to his remote cabin. Penny and Bernadette improvise after Amy doesn't like the bachelorette they planned. S11, Ep20
A Tie Breaker & A Huge Mistake. Tensions rise when new co-owners Georgie and Ruben realise they can't agree on anything. Jim struggles to find his purpose now that he's retired. S2, Ep1
Fan Mail. Georgie's upset when Mandy's new role as weekend weather girl gets her more attention from the men in town, and Connor turns to Jim for help. S2, Ep2
Istanbul. Leech therapy, brutal massages and shaving a grown man are all on the menu for comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe's Istanbul odyssey. S1, Ep1
The Comet Polarization. Sheldon's comic book store experience changes when Neil Gaiman puts Stuart's store on the map. And Raj takes credit for Penny's astronomical discovery. S11, Ep21
The Monetary Insufficiency. Sheldon goes to Vegas to win money for science. Penny and Bernadette take Amy wedding dress shopping, but her choice entangles them in a web of lies. S11, Ep22
An American Tail. The large bump at the base of Taylor's spine is more dangerous than she realizes. John has an embarrassing hip lump, and Noelle wants her stretched ears repaired. S1, Ep7
Istanbul. Leech therapy, brutal massages and shaving a grown man are all on the menu for comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe's Istanbul odyssey. S1, Ep1
Money Laundering. While Missy asks some uncomfortable questions about sex in church, Meemaw and Georgie go into business together. S5, Ep6
Mom's Seal of Approval. Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mum is not sure. Plus, Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. S12, Ep2
Maja's Story. Maja moves to Houston for a difficult weight-loss journey with the support of her boyfriend. But when he abruptly leaves her, she must do it alone. S7, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Beat The Dress Show. The clock is ticking for bride Amy, who has just one month to find a new gown. And, Rachel must win gran's approval for her dress, as she's buying it! S3, Ep35

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Sister Show. Fussy bride Cecily is hoping her older sister Ellie can help her find her dream dress. Plus, Jodie bought a slim-fitted gown a year ago and now she's pregnant! S3, Ep36

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Mums & Daughters. Danielle who has dwarfism, looks for a dress that suits her size, but also pleases her mum. Plus, Rihannon seeks reassurance from her daughter, after her mum died. S4, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Budget Busters. Michaela is anxious about picking the right dress as she knows how expensive they can be. Meanwhile, can realist bride Anna and her bargain hunter mum see eye to eye? S4, Ep2

Windy City. Mike and Carl get stuck working at the Renaissance Faire after their boss, Captain Murphy, gets dumped by Mike's mother. S3, Ep23
Molly Unleashed. Molly finds herself at a crossroads with her career and makes a huge decision to leave her teaching job to become a writer. S4, Ep1
Poker In Front, Looker In Back. Molly recruits Joyce to spy on her next-door neighbour. Mike and the guys get together for a poker game and end up sharing their hopes and dreams. S4, Ep5

Shoeless Molly Flynn. Molly needs to adjust her spending habits on shoes if she wants to maintain harmony in her marriage with Mike. S4, Ep6
They Shoot Asses, Don't They? After being shot during a robbery, Mike wants to live each day like it's his last and tells Carl it's time for him to quit the police force. S4, Ep7
What Molly Hath Wrought. Molly decides to take a break from writing her novel and accepts a job as a forklift driver at Vince's warehouse - with mixed results. S4, Ep8
Introduction To Engineering. Sheldon takes his first engineering class with Professor Boucher. Meanwhile, Meemaw and Dale help take care of his ex-wife, June. S5, Ep7
The Grand Chancellor. While Sheldon battles the mysterious Grand Chancellor of the university over science requirements, Mary makes a shocking discovery about Georgie. S5, Ep8
The Yips And Hypnotic Bohemian. While George Sr. plays handyman at Brenda Sparks' house, Sheldon gets the science yips and has to learn how not to think. S5, Ep9
The Sibling Realignment. Sheldon and Leonard travel to Texas to end a family feud. The Wolowitz kids inadvertently infest Amy, Bernadette, Howard and Raj with pinkeye. S11, Ep23
The Bow Tie Asymmetry. When Amy's parents and Sheldon's family arrive, everybody is focused on making sure all goes according to plan - everyone except the bride and groom. S11, Ep24
The Conjugal Configuration. Sheldon and Amy's honeymoon runs aground, while Penny and Leonard discover similarities with Amy's parents. Raj insults physicist Neil deGrasse Tyson. S12, Ep1
The Wedding Gift Wormhole. Sheldon and Amy try to figure out what 'perfect gift' Leonard and Penny gave them. Raj asks his father to arrange a marriage for him. S12, Ep2
The Procreation Calculation. Stuart starts bringing his new girlfriend home, Penny and Leonard talk about starting a family, and Raj explores an arranged marriage. S12, Ep3
The Tam Turbulence. Sheldon won't tell anyone why he's never mentioned his childhood friend Tam. Bernadette and Penny take out Raj's fiancée to get the skinny on her. S12, Ep4
The Planetarium Collision. Amy doesn't have time to work on a project, so Sheldon goes to great lengths to ensure she can work with him, even if it means sabotaging her career. S12, Ep5
The Imitation Perturbation. When Howard dresses up as Sheldon for Halloween, Sheldon seeks retaliation. Leonard is shocked that Penny doesn't remember their first kiss. S12, Ep6
